section.heading: Council on Credit and Finance

subsection.heading: Establishment.—
subsection.content: The Secretary of Transportation shall establish a Council on Credit and Finance in accordance with this section.

paragraph.heading: In general.—
paragraph.chapeau: The Council shall be composed of the following members:

subparagraph.content: The Under Secretary of Transportation for Policy.
The Chief Financial Officer and Assistant Secretary for Budget and Programs.
The General Counsel of the Department of Transportation.
The Assistant Secretary for Transportation Policy.
The Administrator of the Federal Highway Administration.
The Administrator of the Federal Transit Administration.
The Administrator of the Federal Railroad Administration.

paragraph.heading: Additional members.—
paragraph.content: The Secretary may designate up to 3 additional officials of the Department to serve as at-large members of the Council.

subparagraph.heading: Chairperson.—
subparagraph.content: The Deputy Secretary of Transportation shall serve as the chairperson of the Council.

subparagraph.heading: Vice chairperson.—
subparagraph.content: The Chief Financial Officer and Assistant Secretary for Budget and Programs shall serve as the vice chairperson of the Council.

paragraph.heading: Executive director.—
paragraph.content: The Executive Director of the National Surface Transportation and Innovative Finance Bureau shall serve as a nonvoting member of the Council.
review applications for assistance submitted under the programs referred to in subparagraphs (A), (B), and (C) of section 116(d)(1);
review applications for assistance submitted under the program referred to in section 116(d)(1)(D), as determined appropriate by the Secretary;
make recommendations to the Secretary regarding the selection of projects to receive assistance under such programs;
review, on a regular basis, projects that received assistance under such programs; and
carry out such additional duties as the Secretary may prescribe.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 114–94, div. A, title IX, § 9002(a), Dec. 4, 2015, 129 Stat. 1618.)

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Oct. 1, 2015, see section 1003 of Pub. L. 114–94, set out as an Effective Date of 2015 Amendment note under section 5313 of Title 5, Government Organization and Employees.
